title: Finance Controller (Construction & Manufacturing)
description:
About our client: Our client is a Singapore based Design & Architecture company.

About the role: We are looking for a driven and proactive person with commercial acumen to be a key support for the management team. This is a hands-on role responsible for all finance operations, including manage statutory compliance, maintain internal controls, and provide financial reporting. The ideal candidate will be involved in day-to-day accounting, cost control, and decision-making support, ensuring financial transparency and alignment with company objectives across Singapore & Malaysia operations.

1) Financial Management & Reporting

  • Maintain accurate and complete financial records, ensuring transparency and compliance with accounting standards.

2) Tax & Compliance (Singapore & Malaysia)

  • Ensure the company meets all tax and statutory obligations accurately and on time, while minimizing tax risks.

3) Budgeting, Forecasting & Cost Control

  • Prepare and manage budgets and forecasts.

  • Monitor operating costs, analyze variances, and identify opportunities to improve efficiency and reduce expenses without compromising operations.

4) Cash Flow & Working Capital Management

  • Monitor incoming and outgoing funds to ensure sufficient cash flow for operational needs.

  • Optimize liquidity and manage banking relationships, loans, and payments to support smooth operations.

5) Risk Management & Internal Controls

  • Establish and monitor internal controls to prevent fraud and errors.

  • Ensure compliance with legal and regulatory requirements.

  • Support audits and report on financial risks and compliance matters.

6) Project Financial Management

  • Oversee project financial performance by tracking budgets, monitoring contract claims, certifications, and payments.

  • Ensure accurate billing, maintain healthy cash flow, and provide financial insights to keep projects within budget.

About you:

  • Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field

  • Professional qualification (ACCA, CPA, CA) preferred

  • Exposure to the construction industry is a plus

  • Strong knowledge of Singapore and Malaysia accounting, tax, and statutory requirements

  • Hands-on experience in budgeting, cash flow management, and financial reporting

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

  • High integrity, attention to detail, and ability to work independently

  • Good communication skills to liaise with management and external stakeholders


Other info:

  • Work location: Central
  • Work hours: Monday - Friday (9am to 6.30pm)

*Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.*
